reasoning_model_1: The model fails to follow the basic instruction regarding the script content. reasoning_model_2: The model correctly reads the provided Chinese script with perfect content accuracy (00:00-00:09). Regarding the paralinguistic feature 'Pitch' (中音 - Medium Pitch), the audio exhibits a natural, conversational pitch range appropriate for a female speaker. For instance, in the segment 00:04-00:06 ('现在可以提交给上级审批了'), the tone is professional and maintains a steady, medium frequency consistent with the instruction. The speech is fluent and natural.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 failed completely by generating speech in the wrong language (English instead of Chinese), violating the core requirement to read the specific text provided. Model 2 accurately followed the script and effectively implemented the 'Medium Pitch' instruction, delivering a natural and professional audio clip.
